data.title: Kat Florence Hotel features La Mer massages daily, Michelin-origin 'Infinity Pâtisserie', and Nordic Winter Spa.Luxury at its best ELORA, ON, Jan.13, 2026.
data.description: A highly acclaimed luxury jeweler is introducing a new era of bespoke accommodations where ultra-luxury amenities are incorporated as necessities in every stay. Located in Elora, ON, the Kat Florence Hotel, which has been renovated and curated by a seven-time world-renowned designer, promises an all-inclusive experience. This initiative marks a significant shift towards offering guests high-end services and facilities as standard, enhancing the overall luxury stay. This development, launched on January 13, 2026, reflects a growing trend in the hospitality industry towards top-tier personalized experiences.

data.title: VR sets date for consolidation. Effective soon.
data.description: In recent reports, it has been revealed that there has been a rise in the number of COVID-19 cases in various regions around the world. The total global count currently stands at over 100 million confirmed cases, with over 2 million deaths attributed to the virus. Several countries are experiencing surges in infections, with some regions reintroducing lockdown measures to curb the spread of the virus. Health experts continue to emphasize the importance of following safety guidelines such as wearing masks, practicing social distancing, and getting vaccinated to mitigate the impact of the pandemic. Additionally, efforts are being made to ramp up vaccination campaigns to achieve widespread immunity and ultimately bring an end to the crisis.

data.title: UK tabletop gaming company Games Workshop will not use AI for Warhammer 40,000 design or creative processes.
data.description: A leading tabletop gaming company based in the United Kingdom, Games Workshop, has affirmed that artificial intelligence-generated content will not be integrated into the design or creative procedures of their popular game Warhammer. This decision ensures that the traditional creative approach will continue to be employed in developing Warhammer, a widely recognized franchise in the gaming industry.

data.title: ElpasBio and Fosun Kairos partner for AlloJoin® stem cell therapy commercialization, Jan 13, 2026.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in Shanghai, ElpasBio Holdings revealed a new collaboration with Fosun Kairos to commercialize ElpasBio's regenerative medicine products. ElpasBio, a prominent biotechnology company in the clinical stage, aims to advance their products with this partnership. This development marks a significant step for ElpasBio as they work towards expanding their market presence.

data.title: Maryland Comptroller and UMD's Smith School release analysis on impact of federal job and spending reductions on state's economy.
data.description: A recent study conducted in Maryland reveals the economic implications of federal job and spending cuts. On January 13, 2026, the Comptroller of Maryland, in partnership with the University of Maryland's Robert H. Smith School of Business, published an analysis showcasing the impact of reductions. This analysis sheds light on the significant effects of job losses and decreased spending on Maryland's economy. The study emphasizes the importance of understanding these consequences and highlights the urgent need for strategic planning to mitigate the adverse outcomes.
According to Goldman Sachs’ modeling, NAND and DRAM will face the most severe supply shortages in 2026 and remain undersupplied through 2027.

data.title: Render Network drives Star Trek AI film with Shatner's approval, using OTOY's tech for 'Unification'. William Shatner gave direct consent for digital Kirk and Spock.
data.description: The 'Unification' short film was created by OTOY's Render Network, utilizing real-time digital prosthetics to accurately depict Kirk and Spock. The film received direct approval from William Shatner. This achievement showcases the power of technology in entertainment, with the project highlighting the capabilities of modern digital tools.

data.title: Webco Industries, Inc. appoints Brad Stoots to Board of Directors, bringing outside members to four.
data.description: In Sand Springs, Oklahoma on January 13, 2026, Webco Industries, Inc. (OTC: WEBC) revealed the addition of Mr. Brad Stoots to their Board of Directors. With this appointment, the number of external members on Webco's Board now stands at four.

data.title: Frequency Holdings Inc. (OTC: FRQN) simplifies disclosures by filing Form 15 to stop SEC periodic reports, choosing direct OTC reporting.
data.description: Frequency Holdings Inc. (OTC: FRQN) based in Chicago, Illinois, revealed on January 13, 2026, that it has submitted a Form 15 to the Securities and Exchange Commission. This move signifies the company's decision to no longer provide regular updates to the SEC, indicating a focused strategy towards direct-to-OTC reporting. This decision highlights the company’s streamlined approach for growth and future operations.
